text: Welcome to 5000 NWS - a unique rummy variant with custom house rules!
The first card dealt to each player determines the wild rank and extra cards to deal.
Big Joker = 20 points, Little Joker = 15 points. Both are always wild.
7♠ is the wild rank! This means all 7s and Jokers are wild, and each player gets 7 extra cards.
Create melds of 3+ same rank (sets) or 3+ sequential same suit (runs).
Select 3 cards of the same rank to create a set, or 3 sequential cards of the same suit for a run.
Great! You can also add cards to existing melds (layoffs) and pick up from deep in the discard pile.
To pick up deep from discard, you must take all cards above your target and immediately use it in a meld.
The goal is to go out by playing all your cards. First to 5000 points wins!
Let's simulate going out to show scoring...
Numbers = face value, Faces = 10, Ace = 15, wild rank cards = 15, Jokers = 15-20 points.
